raw:
## Completed
Documented the CTO gate-relay behavior: Gate 1 and Gate 2 now use `AskUserQuestion` Approve/Revise prompts, mapped back to unchanged `foreman({ resume, approve|reject })` calls.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/AGENTS.md` - added AskUserQuestion gate relay guidance and headless fallback.
- `extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md` - updated “The two gates” table/description with AskUserQuestion relay behavior.

## How To Verify
`grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh`

## Notes
Verify command passed. No `.ts` or `.pi/foreman.json` edits were made by this task. The repo already had unrelated dirty files outside this scoped doc diff.
